steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Mark the given angle relationships on the figure first: equal angles, vertical angles, supplementary angles, parallel-line angles, and triangle sums of $180^\circ$. Most of these questions become a short angle chase once the givens are marked.

steps.title: Use consecutive interior angles to find y
steps.content:
Lines $q$ and $r$ are parallel, and line $s$ is a transversal. The angles 58° and $y^{\circ}$ are consecutive interior angles (also called same-side interior angles), which are supplementary for parallel lines:
$$58^{\circ} + y^{\circ} = 180^{\circ}$$
$$y = 122$$

steps.title: Substitute y into the given equation to find x
